content:
## File Structure

### Phase 1: Metadata + Repo-Aware Write + Filtered Search

| Action | File | Responsibility |
|--------|------|---------------|
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-common/src/types.rs:30-36` | Add `content_role`, `source_origin` to `EntryMetadata` |
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-common/src/config.rs:37-42` | Add `DocsConfig`/`DocsRulesConfig`, wire into `WorkspaceConfig` |
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-kernel/src/rag_types.rs:8-23` | Add `content_role`/`source_origin` filter fields to `RetrievalOpts` |
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-kernel/src/retriever.rs` | Post-filter search results by metadata fields |
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-server/src/rest.rs:59-88` | Extend `SearchResultDto`, `SearchRequest`, `From<SearchResult>` |
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-server/src/mcp.rs:114-142` | Add filter params to `corvia_search`/`corvia_write` tool schemas |
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-server/src/mcp.rs:610-711` | Implement post-filter in `tool_corvia_search`, read new fields in `tool_corvia_write` |
